Overcoming the barrier
of biomedical research
Jinsong Zhang, PhD
Saint Louis University
jinsongzhang8012@gmail.com
Issues with centralized funding
• Inefficient (takes up to several years from
application to funding)
• Lack of transparency
• Huge price overhead
• Subjective review process (sometimes biased)
• Very low funding capability (most projects cannot
be funded)
• Issues with the monitoring of funding spending
Solution: decentralized funding
approach
• Enable Crowdfunding
• Enable a need-based approach for research
funding
• More efficient
• Enable peer-to-peer funding support
• Reduced overhead
• Immutable track records to improve transparency
and monitoring of funding spending
• Enable voting of liquidity providers
DERF
Liquidity Pool
DEX
DEFI
Staking…
Crowdfunding/rewards
Institutions
Government
Funded Research
Industry/patents
P2P
funding
Blockchain immutable records of spending
Roadmap
• Phase 1:
• Establish a native ERC2 token, DERF (Decentralized research funding),
for this project
• Establish a Liquidity Pool (DERF/ETH)
• Phase 2:
• Develop an example project funded by DERF
• Free genome sequencing paid by DREF rewards
• Phage 3:
• Governance plan for funding
• Lending protocols/Borrowing protocols
• Phase 4:
• Integration into the current funding system
• Institutional adoption
• Government adoption
• International adoption
Phase 1:
Establish a native ERC2 token, DERF (Decentralized
research funding), for this project
Establish a Liquidity Pool (DERF/ETH)
Phage 3:
Governance plan for funding
Lending protocols/Borrowing protocols

Develop an example project funded by DERF
Free genome sequencing paid by DREF rewards
Phase 4:
Integration into the current funding system
Institutional adoption, Government adoption
International adoption
Budget (phases 1,2) (1 year)
• Compensation (3 people)
• $200,000 / year
• Computation-related expenses
• $20,000/year
• Cost for smart contrast deployment
• $20,000/year
• Website/Social network
• $10,000/year
• Total: $250,000/year ($625,000/quarter)
Outcome measurement
• Sustained liquidity of DERF/ETH pool
• Develop an efficient funding governance plan
• Increased funding rate (> 50%)
